reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Like all ACAs, a very nice place, delicious breakfast and excellent service.

The bathrooms are disgusting, completely unclean, a disgrace.

reviews.comment:

reviews.comment:
Muy cómodo para pasar un momento de descanso para continuar el viaje posee mesas en el recreo con acceso libre

(Translated by Google)
Very comfortable for taking a break before continuing your journey; it has tables in the recreation area with free access

reviews.comment:
Todo muy limpio!!!!! Con espacio para que jueguen los chicos.

(Translated by Google)
Everything was very clean! With space for the kids to play.

Very nice, clean.

reviews.comment:
Excelente lugar para parar y hacer un descanso para seguir el viaje de regreso, al aire libre con un lugar verde, muy cuidado, con bancos y mesas, además de las comodidades que ofrece ser asociado al Automóvil Club Argentino.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent place to stop and take a break before continuing your return journey, outdoors with a well-maintained green space, with benches and tables, in addition to the amenities offered by being a member of the Argentine Automobile Club.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzODlqMi1nRRAB
